name: Spatial Workspace
description: Immersive spatial workspace with depth-layered canvases, holographic controls, and real-time presence indicators for collaborative creative work.

pages.notes: Full-bleed workspace: depth-layered-canvas is the primary surface; holographic-control-bar floats as toolbar overlay; spatial-presence-ring shows active collaborators at canvas edges
Workspace configuration: grid snapping, depth layers, presence visibility, collaboration permissions

page_briefs.workspace: Full-bleed immersive canvas. Depth-layered canvas surface fills the viewport with draggable objects at different Z-levels. Floating holographic control bar at the top or side for tools. Collaborator presence ring at canvas edges showing active users with colored indicators.
page_briefs.workspace-settings: Standard settings page. Settings nav on the left with sections for grid, layers, presence, and permissions. Structured form on the right with toggle switches, sliders, and dropdowns for workspace preferences.

shells.canvas-overlay: Full-bleed canvas with floating overlay panels and toolbar
shells.sidebar-main: Standard sidebar layout for settings pages
